name: Selim Ahmed
position: Software Analyst | AI Enthusiast | PGD in Project Management
text: Working with Sazzad at Orion Group has been a great experience. He contributed across the entire SDLC and was instrumental in developing employee appraisal systems, final settlement systems, circular management systems, and internal portals using C#, ASP.NET MVC/Core, ASP.NET Web Forms, MSSQL, Entity Framework, and LINQ. He also worked with Angular, JavaScript, jQuery, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap to build responsive and user-friendly interfaces. His technical strength, problem-solving ability, and commitment to delivering secure, scalable, and high-performance solutions consistently stood out. Sazzad is professional, collaborative, and dependable.

name: Abu Syeed Ahmed
position: Senior Software Engineer at BRAC IT | .NET | .NET Core | Angular | ReactJS
text:
I had the opportunity to work with Sazzad Hossain at Avalanche Technologies Ltd. on several enterprise ERP projects. He demonstrated strong technical expertise in C#, ASP.NET MVC, MSSQL, Entity Framework, and JavaScript, consistently delivering reliable and scalable solutions.
Sazzad Hossain is a proactive problem solver and a great team player who always maintains high coding standards. I highly recommend him as a talented and dependable software professional.

name: Evan Sihab
position: Full Stack Software Engineer | .Net Developer | Enterprise Solution Expert
text:
I had the pleasure of working with Sazzad Hossain at Avalanche Technologies Ltd., where we collaborated on developing enterprise ERP solutions for clients in the pharmaceutical, manufacturing, retail, and government sectors.

Sazzad Hossain is a highly skilled and dedicated professional with strong technical expertise and a problem-solving mindset. He consistently delivered reliable and scalable solutions while maintaining high coding standards and working effectively within the team.

Beyond his technical capabilities, Sazzad Hossain is supportive, professional, and always willing to help others. I strongly recommend him to any organization seeking a talented and dependable software professional.

name: Kazi Zuljalal Md. Maslinia
position: Sr. Software Engineer | ASP.NET | Flutter | MSSQL | ERP | Software Architect
text: Collaborating with Sazzad at Orion Group was a great experience. He contributed across the full SDLC and played a key role in developing employee appraisal systems, final settlement solutions, and internal portals using C#, ASP.NET MVC/Core, MSSQL, and Entity Framework, along with modern frontend technologies. He is technically strong, reliable, and highly collaborative.
